arts.ttl: Serie A | Verona v Lazio: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Lazio prepare to face Hellas Verona in Serie A, the Biancocelesti have received a significant boost with the return of several key players. Captain Mattia Zaccagni, who spent six years at Verona before joining Lazio, has been cleared to play despite earlier concerns about his fitness. The post Serie A | Verona v Lazio: Probable starting lineups appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Serie A Liveblog including Inter-Empoli, Verona-Lazio and Fiorentina-Torino
Verona and Lazio in search of redemption
arts.sum: Hellas Verona are unbeaten in their last three home Serie A games against Lazio (W1 D2), drawing the two most recent; only once have the two teams drawn three consecutive matches at the Bentegodi stadium in the top-flight: between 1975 and 1978. After the win in the reverse match on 16 th September, Lazio could win both of their Serie A games against Hellas Verona in a single season for the first time since 2017/18.

arts.ttl: Hellas Verona vs Lazio | Serie A | Team News & Probable Lineups
arts.sum: Lazio will be desperate to return to winning ways when they take on Hellas Verona away from home in the 21st round of Serie A. The clash kicks off at the Bentegodi Stadium on Sunday, 20:45 CET.
